title: Opening for Software Engineer at Nature's Basket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Nature's Basket
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket family as a Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
